title: Add a field to a JSON config and consume it
prompt: The file `config.json` holds app settings and `getTimeout.mjs` reads it. Add a numeric field `timeoutMs` set to 5000 in `config.json`, and update `getTimeout.mjs` so its exported `getTimeout()` returns that value from the config (currently it returns a hardcoded 0). Read the config file relative to the module using fs.
